name: split-metric
description: One number owns the room — light left with the hero metric, dark right with supporting findings.
purpose: Use when a single KPI is the argument. The hero number is the headline; the right-side list explains why the number matters and what the trend implies.

unit.description: Optional inline-code unit label above the metric (e.g. 'Net Revenue Retention').

metric.description: The hero number. Wrap a unit in *italics* (e.g. '114*%*') to render at smaller weight.

context.description: One-sentence context line below the metric — measurement window, cohort, comparison.

findings.description: Right-side supporting findings. Lead each with **Title.** then nested body.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: split-metric -->

`Metric name`

## 114*%*

Measurement window and qualifying detail in one short sentence.

- **First supporting point.** Why this metric matters and what's driving it.
- **Second supporting point.** What concentration or trend explains it.
- **Third supporting point.** What this number unlocks or threatens.
